---
title: "Portfolio Presentation"
subtitle: "Analytics, Digital Strategy, and Business Decision-Making"
author: "Kennon Holton-Tran"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
    keyboard: true
    touch: true
    footer: "<a href='index.html'>← Back to Portfolio Home</a>"
---

## Kennon Holton-Tran

Business Administration, E-Business  
California State Polytechnic University, Pomona

**Portfolio Focus:**  
Analytics, digital marketing, dashboards, and business strategy

<br>

**Use the arrow controls or press the right arrow key → to move through the presentation.**

[← Back to Portfolio Home](index.html)

## Career Direction

My goal is to move into a strategic leadership role where I can help define a company’s vision, organize the structure needed to support that vision, and use data to guide better business decisions.

I am interested in work that combines:

- Strategy
- Analytics
- Technology
- Digital business
- Communication
- Team execution

## Portfolio Overview

This website includes:

- A professional home page
- A projects page
- A streaming service loyalty dashboard
- A Google Analytics page
- This Revealjs presentation

The goal is to show both technical skill and business thinking.

## Featured Project

### Streaming Service Loyalty Research

This project explores what influences customer loyalty to streaming platforms.

Key areas include:

- Price sensitivity
- Satisfaction
- Content quality
- Original content
- Cancellation intent
- Platform loyalty

## Dashboard Development

I built a Quarto dashboard using survey data from the Streaming Service Loyalty project.

The dashboard summarizes:

- Valid survey responses
- Mean loyalty index
- High cancellation risk
- Past-year cancellation behavior
- NPS categories
- Loyalty statement averages

## Why the Dashboard Matters

The dashboard turns survey data into a clearer decision-making tool.

Instead of only reading raw responses, the audience can quickly understand:

- How loyal respondents appear to be
- Whether cancellation risk is present
- Which loyalty statements score higher or lower
- How cancellation history relates to loyalty

## Google Analytics 4

My Google Analytics page highlights work with GA4 and digital measurement.

GA4 helps businesses understand:

- Where users come from
- What users do on a website or app
- Which actions support business goals
- Whether campaigns are producing meaningful outcomes

## Certification Evidence

I completed the Google Analytics Certification in 2026.

This supports my understanding of:

- Digital measurement
- Events
- Conversions
- Website behavior
- Marketing performance analysis

## Technical Skills Demonstrated

This portfolio demonstrates experience with:

- Quarto websites
- Quarto dashboards
- Revealjs presentations
- R
- Data visualization
- GitHub Pages
- Google Analytics 4
- Excel-based survey analysis

## Business Skills Demonstrated

This portfolio also reflects:

- Strategic thinking
- Marketing research planning
- Consumer behavior analysis
- Professional communication
- Project organization
- Audience-focused reporting
- Translating data into decisions

## Strengths

My strengths are strongest at the intersection of strategy, technology, and communication.

I like work that involves:

- Understanding the larger goal
- Organizing the moving pieces
- Finding useful patterns in information
- Communicating clearly
- Helping teams make better decisions

## Career Objective

Long term, I want to build toward leadership roles where I can help organizations improve systems, clarify strategy, and make better decisions with data.

I am especially interested in roles connected to:

- Business analytics
- Digital strategy
- Product thinking
- Marketing analytics
- Operations and execution

## Closing

This portfolio represents my current work in analytics, digital tools, marketing research, and business strategy.

It shows the direction I want to keep building toward:

**strategic, analytical, organized, and impact-focused.**

<br>

[← Return to Portfolio Home](index.html)
